title: Tendinitis
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Tendinitis is inflammation, irritation, or swelling of a tendon.
It can cause pain and tenderness near a joint, often related to overuse.
Supportive care can include rest, activity modification, and clinician-directed pain control.
Rupture concern, infection, trauma, neurovascular compromise, or specialist-directed plans require separate handling.
